title: Sleepy Scent end sleep and send this card to cemetery

card.rawText: Equipped creature is put to sleep for 2 turn cycles. It cannot initiate battle, but also heals 10 HP per turn cycle. Any damage wakes the sleeping creature and sends this card to your cemetery.
